F: No pressure route closure is inferred; this checker validates deterministic finite-numeric diagnostic outputs only.
G: No theorem, Clay, or theorem-promotion claim is introduced by this checker.
L: Errors indicate schema or numeric violations; promotion/authority violations remain hard failures.
O: Regression checker for interior pressure budget and omega L3 timeseries diagnostics.
R: Fail-closed validation of interior budget fields, frame counts, selected cells, lambda/eigenbasis fields, budgets, and L3-row numeric integrity.
S: Checks are best-effort across diagnostic outputs and require non-promotion authority with finite numerics on declared output contracts.
